name: Retinol
function: Speeds up cell turnover, reduces fine lines, unclogs pores, treats acne
usage_tip: Start 2x per week at night only. Always follow with SPF next morning. Expect purging for 4-6 weeks.

name: Niacinamide
function: Brightening, pore minimizing, reduces redness, strengthens skin barrier, controls oil
usage_tip: Can be used morning and night. One of the safest actives — safe to layer with almost everything.

name: Hyaluronic Acid
function: Deep hydration, plumping, draws moisture into the skin
usage_tip: Apply to damp skin immediately after cleansing. Always seal with a moisturizer on top or it draws moisture out of skin in dry climates.

name: Salicylic Acid
function: Oil-soluble exfoliant, unclogs pores from inside, anti-inflammatory, anti-acne
usage_tip: Use at night, maximum 3x per week when starting out. Do not combine with other exfoliants on the same night.

name: Benzoyl Peroxide
function: Kills acne-causing bacteria, reduces inflammation, prevents antibiotic resistance
usage_tip: Start with 2.5% strength — just as effective as 10% but far less irritating. Will bleach fabric so use white towels and pillowcases.

name: Vitamin C
function: Brightening, antioxidant protection, boosts collagen production, fades dark spots
usage_tip: Use in the morning before SPF. Unstable ingredient — store in a dark cool place. Discard if it turns orange or brown.

name: Ceramides
function: Repairs and strengthens the skin barrier, locks in moisture, reduces water loss
usage_tip: Best delivered through moisturizers. Essential for eczema-prone and barrier-damaged skin. Use morning and night.

name: AHA
function: Surface exfoliation, brightening, smoothing rough texture, fading post-acne marks
pregnancy_safe: lactic acid yes, glycolic acid consult doctor
usage_tip: Night use only. Always follow with SPF the next morning — AHAs increase sun sensitivity significantly. Max 3x per week.

name: Zinc Oxide
function: Physical UV protection, anti-inflammatory, mild antibacterial
usage_tip: Apply as the last step in morning routine. Reapply every 2 hours with sun exposure. May leave white cast on deeper skin tones.

name: Tretinoin
function: Prescription-strength cell turnover, treats acne, anti-aging, fades hyperpigmentation
usage_tip: Prescription only. Use pea-sized amount for entire face. Expect 6-8 weeks purging phase before improvement. Always use SPF.

name: Azelaic Acid
function: Antibacterial, reduces redness, fades hyperpigmentation, treats rosacea and acne
pregnancy_safe: yes — one of few actives safe in pregnancy
usage_tip: Can be used morning and night. One of the only actives safe during pregnancy. Particularly effective for rosacea-related redness.

name: Centella Asiatica
function: Calming, wound healing, strengthens skin barrier, reduces redness
usage_tip: Excellent for calming irritated or post-active skin. Use after exfoliants or retinoids to reduce irritation response.

name: Squalane
function: Lightweight moisturizing, mimics skin's natural oils, non-greasy hydration
usage_tip: Works on all skin types including oily — it signals skin to produce less oil. Can be mixed into moisturizer or used alone as last step.

name: Kojic Acid
function: Inhibits melanin production, fades dark spots and hyperpigmentation
usage_tip: Use at night. Can cause irritation in high concentrations — start with lower percentage. Popular for treating melasma alongside Vitamin C.

name: Metronidazole
function: Prescription antibiotic for rosacea, reduces inflammation and papules
usage_tip: Prescription treatment for rosacea. Applied topically 1-2x daily. Works specifically on inflammatory rosacea — not effective for vascular rosacea.
